cases.proof_target: existing host command routing behavior remains stable
cases.preservation_constraints: no command rename, no lifecycle semantic change, no second Host path
cases.shared_write_surface_gate: passes: no unrelated dirty overlap in write surface
cases.blocked_actions: execution without approved bounded task remains blocked
cases.safe_next_step: create or inspect bounded task before editing

cases.write_surface: proposed docs and formatter scope still needs exact files
cases.preservation_constraints: no public claim change and no release gate change
cases.shared_write_surface_gate: no write-surface check because scope is planning-only
cases.blocked_actions: code edits are blocked until exact scope and validation are named
cases.safe_next_step: write a bounded plan with exact files and validation

cases.scope_anchor: missing: exact module boundary not named
cases.proof_target: preserve execution, review, and boundary ordering
cases.preservation_constraints: no behavior change hidden inside refactor
cases.validation_surface: likely targeted execution/review tests, but not bound to files
cases.blocked_actions: editing before scope anchor and write surface are named
cases.safe_next_step: inspect source and name one bounded module/file surface

cases.hotspot_family: Context, worker request, and adapter pipeline
cases.proof_target: preserve worker request selection and adapter routing
cases.preservation_constraints: no provider routing change and no new worker pipeline
cases.shared_write_surface_gate: pending: write surface must be checked after validation is named
cases.blocked_actions: claiming ready or complete without targeted validation
cases.safe_next_step: identify or add cheapest focused worker/adapter test

cases.proof_target: preserve codegraph lookup and artifact policy behavior
cases.preservation_constraints: no truth ownership change and no protected root write
cases.shared_write_surface_gate: blocked: overlapping dirty/user-owned write surface reported
cases.safe_next_step: pause for operator review or wait for surface ownership to clear

cases.hotspot_family: High-churn tests coupled to production family
cases.proof_target: preserve task graph and test behavior
cases.validation_surface: tests alone are not enough for protected truth writes
cases.shared_write_surface_gate: blocked: proposed write surface includes protected root
cases.blocked_actions: direct protected-root edit or lifecycle mutation
cases.safe_next_step: route through Host/governed card and remove protected root from local refactor
